query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(costBasis AS DECIMAL(18,6))) as total_cost FROM positions GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(costBasis AS DECIMAL(18,6))) as total_cost FROM positions GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
